layman_headline: Crypto market is in deep fear mode — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: Bitcoin has dropped below $60,000 and the overall market sentiment is at 'Extreme Fear' — one of the lowest readings possible. Almost every major cryptocurrency is down significantly over the past week. While fear can create buying opportunities, none of the coins on our watchlist have a clean enough setup to justify risking money right now. The best candidates are either already overbought after huge runs (VELVET up 218% in a week) or stuck in clear downtrends with no reversal signals yet.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. Set alerts for NEAR Protocol around $1.75 and Solana around $66. If either reaches those levels with signs of a bounce, that could be a much better entry. Don't chase anything in this fearful environment without a confirmed reversal.
expert_reasoning: The market is in extreme fear (18/100, worsening trend) with BTC losing the $60K level and facing capitulation-level UTXO movements. VELVET's +218% weekly gain and RSI of 70 make it a classic 'too late to chase' setup with a terrible R/R ratio of 0.66x near resistance. WLD and NEAR both pulled back 15-25% but neither shows a bullish reversal candle or MACD cross to confirm a bottom. SOL at RSI 42 is approaching oversold but its chart bias is -0.70 with price below all major MAs — no reason to catch this knife yet. ENA and PUMP are in confirmed downtrends with -1.40 chart bias scores. The prudent move is to remain in cash and let the capitulation play out before deploying capital. NEAR gets the nod as the best watchlist candidate given its uptrend structure still intact and moderate pullback, but entry should wait for $1.75 support or a confirmed bullish reversal candle.
risk_factors: BTC breaking below $58K could trigger cascading liquidations and drag all alts down another 15-20%
Extreme Fear readings can persist for weeks — catching the exact bottom is nearly impossible
Macro headwinds from gold/silver selloff correlating with crypto weakness suggest broader risk-off environment
watch_list: BTC price action around $58,000 — a break below could trigger full capitulation and create real buying opportunities
Fear & Greed Index trajectory — watch for stabilization or uptick from current 18 as a sign of sentiment bottoming
NEAR and SOL daily candles for hammer/morning star reversal patterns at support levels
market_context: Bitcoin is below $60K heading toward a rare back-to-back quarterly loss, with extreme fear dominating sentiment at 18/100 and worsening. UTXO data shows 50K BTC moved at a loss, signaling active capitulation — the market hasn't found its floor yet.
context_banner: Extreme Fear at 18/100 with BTC capitulation underway — capital preservation trumps opportunity hunting until a reversal signal appears.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 18/100 with a worsening weekly trend (avg 16.9) — sentiment has not bottomed and buying into this without reversal confirmation is premature.
50K BTC moved at a loss signals active capitulation phase — historically this precedes a bottom but the timing is uncertain and more downside is possible.
Gold and silver selloff dragging BTC down indicates a broader risk-off environment, not just crypto-specific weakness.
SOL and PUMP approaching oversold (RSI ~42) but lack bullish reversal candles — oversold can get more oversold in capitulation markets.
No volume-confirmed breakouts among candidates — VELVET's volume surge is into overbought territory (RSI 70) making it a distribution risk, not accumulation.
